---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement for Oz AI
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Summary

<!-- A clear, one-sentence description of the feature being proposed. -->

## Problem This Solves

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected by the problem? -->
<!-- Reference a user persona from 01_PROJECT_BRIEF.md if applicable. -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the solution you'd like. Be specific about how it should work from a user perspective. -->

## Affected Component

<!-- Select all that apply -->

- [ ] Backend API (`backend/`)
- [ ] Agent Pipeline — existing agent enhancement (`agents/`)
- [ ] Agent Pipeline — new agent proposal
- [ ] MCP Tool Layer — new or modified tool (`mcp/`)
- [ ] Frontend Dashboard (`frontend/`)
- [ ] Evaluation Harness
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Infrastructure / Deployment

## Agent Impact (if applicable)

<!-- If this feature affects the agent pipeline, describe which agents are impacted. -->
<!-- Note: Adding or removing a pipeline stage requires an ADR. -->

## Scope Assessment

<!-- How significant is this change? -->

- [ ] Minor — Small enhancement, no architecture change
- [ ] Moderate — New feature within existing architecture
- [ ] Major — Requires architecture change (requires ADR in `04_DECISIONS.md`)
- [ ] Post-MVP — Should be added to the Future Roadmap in `01_PROJECT_BRIEF.md`

## Proposed Implementation Approach

<!-- If you have a technical approach in mind, describe it here. -->
<!-- This is optional — it is fine to describe the "what" without the "how." -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- What other approaches were considered and why were they not preferred? -->

## Competition Alignment

<!-- Does this feature improve alignment with the Kaggle AI Agents Intensive evaluation criteria? -->
<!-- Select all that apply -->

- [ ] Improves multi-agent demonstration
- [ ] Improves ADK usage
- [ ] Improves MCP tool use
- [ ] Improves human-in-the-loop design
- [ ] Improves evaluation and metrics
- [ ] Improves security / Guardian Agent capabilities
- [ ] Improves deployability
- [ ] Not directly competition-related (future roadmap item)

<!-- Does this feature require any new libraries not in the approved stack? -->
<!-- If yes, this requires an ADR before implementation. -->

- [ ] No new dependencies
- [ ] Yes — new dependency required (list below and note ADR will be needed)
